instance.switchHint: After switching, Models, Agents and other pages will manage the selected instance
instance.nameRequired: Please fill in name and endpoint
instance.switchedTo: Switched to {name} — Models, Agents, etc. will manage this instance
instance.remoteHint: The remote server must be running ClawPanel (serve.js).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.versionAhead: Current version is ahead of recommended stable {version}, may be unstable
dashboard.multiInstallHint: Choose which one to use in Settings
dashboard.restartTimeout: Restart timed out, Gateway may still be starting
dashboard.versionAheadWarn: Local version {current} is ahead of recommended stable {recommended}, may have compatibility risks
dashboard.alignedWithLatest: Aligned with recommended stable, latest upstream is {version}

services.title: Services
services.desc: Manage OpenClaw services, check updates, config backups
services.uninstallConfirm:
Uninstall Gateway service?
This will stop the service and remove the LaunchAgent.
services.actionTimeout: {action} timed out, Gateway may still be starting
services.cancelled: Cancelled waiting. Refresh later to check status.
services.aheadOfRecommended: Current version is ahead of recommended stable: {version}
services.policyAhead: Local version {ver} is ahead of panel recommended stable {recommended}. Continued use may have compatibility or stability risks. Consider rolling back.
services.policyDefault: Only the panel-verified recommended stable version is suggested by default. To try other versions or latest features, manually switch in the About page and verify compatibility yourself. To request newer version support, file an issue.
services.configEditorHint: Edit the openclaw.json config file directly. A backup is auto-created before saving. Changes may require a Gateway restart.
services.configSavedGwFailed: Config saved, but Gateway restart failed
services.configBackupHint: Backup scope: openclaw.json main config (models, providers, Gateway settings). Agent data and memory files are not included.
services.restoreConfirm:
Restore backup "{name}"?
Current config will be auto-backed up first.
services.deleteConfirm: Delete backup "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
services.upgradeConfirm:
Switch OpenClaw to the panel-recommended stable {source}{version}?
Gateway will be briefly interrupted.
To try the latest version, manually switch in the About page.
services.switchSourceConfirm:
Switch to {target}{version}?
This installs the corresponding npm package. Config data is not affected.
To try the latest, manually switch in the About page.
services.webModeNoLog: Web mode: Upgrade logs unavailable, please wait...

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Manage ClawPanel network, proxy and download source settings
settings.cliBindHint: Select which OpenClaw CLI the panel should use, useful when multiple versions coexist
settings.cliSwitchConfirm: Switch to this CLI? The panel will use this installation for all operations.
settings.languageHint: Switch the interface language. Some content may remain in the original language.
settings.proxyHint: Once set, npm install/upgrade, version checks, GitHub/Gitee update checks, ClawHub Skills downloads will use this proxy. Localhost and LAN addresses are auto-bypassed. Takes effect immediately; if Gateway is running, consider restarting the service.
settings.modelProxyToggle: Route model test and model list requests through proxy
settings.modelProxyHint: Off by default. Some model API endpoints are already domestic or LAN addresses — proxying them may cause connection failures. Only enable if your model provider requires a proxy.
settings.modelProxyNoProxy: Please set up a network proxy above before enabling this option.
settings.registryHint: npm registry used for upgrades and version checks. Taobao mirror recommended for users in China.
settings.dirHint: Custom OpenClaw config directory path. Restart required after changes. Target directory must exist and contain openclaw.json.
settings.restartConfirm: Restart required for changes to take effect. Restart now?
settings.restartFailed: Auto-restart failed, please close and reopen manually
settings.effectNextLaunch: will take effect on next launch
settings.proxyUrlInvalid: Proxy URL must start with http:// or https://
settings.proxyWarn: Proxy reachable but returned abnormal response (HTTP {status}, {ms}ms)
settings.proxyUrlEmpty: Please enter a proxy URL, or click "Disable Proxy"
settings.proxySaved: Network proxy saved; if Gateway is running, consider restarting the service

models.title: Models
models.desc: Add AI model providers, configure available models
models.providerHint: Providers are sources of models (e.g. OpenAI, DeepSeek). Each provider can have multiple models. The "primary" model is used first; others serve as fallbacks. Changes are auto-saved.
models.qtcoolDesc: GPT-5 / Codex full series, as low as 20-30% of official price. Refund anytime.
models.qtcoolKeyPlaceholder: Paste API Key (get from dashboard after check-in)
models.qtcoolCheckinHint: for free daily credits, copy your Key from
models.qtcoolSelectHint: Fetched {count} available models from QingChen Cloud. Select and add.
models.qtcoolNoKeyWarn: Please enter an API Key (get free credits via daily check-in)
models.fallbackHint: When the primary model is unavailable, the system auto-switches to fallbacks
models.noProvider: No providers. Click "+ Add Provider" to get started.
models.noModel: No models. Click "+ Model" to add.
models.batchSelectHint: Please select models to delete first
models.quickSelectHint: Choose a preset to auto-fill, or fill manually below
models.providerNameHint: Custom identifier to distinguish different sources
models.baseUrlHint: API endpoint URL, usually ends with /v1; Ollama: http://127.0.0.1:11434
models.apiKeyHint: Required key for the service. Leave empty if not needed.
models.apiTypeHint: Most proxies and Ollama use "OpenAI Compatible"
models.quickAddHint: Click to add a common model, or fill in manually below
models.modelIdHint: Must match the model name supported by the provider
models.contextLengthHint: Maximum token count supported by the model
models.isReasoning: This is a reasoning model (e.g. o3, R1, QwQ)
models.reasoningHint: Reasoning models use special invocation methods
models.batchTestAborted: Batch test aborted: {ok} passed, {fail} failed, {skip} skipped
models.selectAtLeast: Please select at least one model
models.configNotReady: Config not loaded yet, please wait
models.fetchRemoteFailed: Cannot fetch model list. Check network or try later.
models.configSavedGwFailed: Config saved, but Gateway restart failed

agents.title: Agents
agents.desc: Create and manage OpenClaw Agents, configure identity, model and workspace
agents.addModelsFirst: Please add models in the Models page first
agents.agentWorkspacePlaceholder: Leave empty to auto-create (optional, absolute path)
agents.idInvalid: Agent ID can only contain lowercase letters, digits, underscores and hyphens
agents.createdNameFailed: Agent created, but name setting failed. You can edit it later.
agents.workspaceReadonly: Set at creation, cannot be changed
agents.confirmDelete:
Delete Agent "{id}"?

This will delete all data and conversations for this agent.
agents.detailHint: Click a card or the Details button to open the new Agent detail page.

agentDetail.name: Name
agentDetail.filesDesc: Core files in the Agent directory that define behavior, identity and memory.
agentDetail.fileAgentsDesc: Session rules, constraints and operating instructions.
agentDetail.fileIdentityDesc: Name, emoji and avatar-related identity settings.
agentDetail.fileUserDesc: User background information supplied to the Agent.
agentDetail.fileHeartbeatDesc: Periodic inspection or background task instructions.
agentDetail.channelsDesc: Manage message channels bound to this Agent.
agentDetail.noBindings: This Agent has no bindings yet.
agentDetail.toolsDesc: Configure the base tool profile and extra allow / deny rules for this Agent.
agentDetail.toolAllowHint: Comma or newline separated. Acts as the base allowlist when set.
agentDetail.toolAlsoAllowHint: Extra tools allowed on top of the selected profile.
agentDetail.skillsDesc: Choose which Skills this Agent may use. Empty means no skill allowlist is enforced.

gateway.title: Gateway Config
gateway.desc: Gateway is the unified entry for AI models. All apps call model services through it.
gateway.saveHint: Click save after changes, Gateway will auto-reload
gateway.portHint: Apps connect to Gateway via this port. Default 18789, usually no need to change.
gateway.localOnlyDesc: Only apps on this machine can access, most secure
gateway.lanShareDesc: Phones, tablets and other devices on the same network can also use it
gateway.authTokenDesc: Standard auth, suitable for local and LAN use
gateway.authPasswordDesc: Required for Tailscale Funnel or other public exposure scenarios
gateway.tokenHintRef: Current token is configured via env variable/reference. Clear to enter plaintext.
gateway.tokenHintNormal: Apps must include this token to authenticate. Strongly recommended if LAN sharing is enabled.
gateway.passwordHint: Password auth is required when exposing Gateway via Tailscale Funnel
gateway.toolsLimitedDesc: Only safe tools allowed, file/command ops disabled
gateway.toolsNoneDesc: Agent can only chat, cannot use any tools
gateway.sessionsHint: Controls whether Agent can see context from other sessions
gateway.tailscaleHint: If using Tailscale VPN, fill in the address so remote devices can access Gateway through it. Leave empty if not used.
gateway.reloaded: Gateway reloaded, new config is active

security.title: Security Settings
security.tauriHasPassword: Password required each time the app is opened
security.webHasPassword: Password required for remote access to the panel
security.tauriNoPassword: Anyone who opens the app can use it
security.webNoPassword: Anyone can access the panel directly
security.defaultFilled: Default password auto-filled. Just set a new password.
security.newPasswordPlaceholder: At least 6 chars, not all digits
security.pwMin6: Password must be at least 6 characters
security.pwTooCommon: Password is too common, please choose a more secure one
security.pwSameAsOld: New password cannot be the same as the old one
security.ignoreRiskDesc: When enabled, anyone can access the panel without a password.
security.ignoreRiskWarn: Only recommended in trusted network environments.
security.ignoreRiskConfirmDesc: Once disabled, anyone who can reach this server's IP and port can directly access the admin panel and modify your AI config.
security.ignoreRiskEnabled: Ignore risk mode enabled, password protection disabled
security.ignoreRiskDisabled: Ignore risk mode disabled, please set a new password

communication.title: Communication & Automation
communication.desc: Manage how AI behaves in messaging channels: reply style, commands, external notifications, etc.
communication.replyPrefixHint: Auto-prepended prefix for each AI reply. Supports {model}, {provider}, {thinkingLevel} variables. Set to auto for Agent name.
communication.ackReactionPlaceholder: e.g. 👀 or leave empty to disable
communication.ackReactionHint: Emoji reaction auto-added when a message is received (acknowledgement)
communication.removeAckAfterReplyHint: Auto-remove the ack emoji after the reply is sent
communication.suppressToolErrorsHint: Don't show ⚠️ tool execution errors to users
communication.enableStatusReactionsHint: Show AI status via emoji in channels (thinking, executing tools, done, etc.)
communication.debounceMsHint: Wait time to merge rapid consecutive messages (ms), prevents AI from replying to each one
communication.queueCapHint: Max length of pending message queue
communication.groupHistoryLimitHint: Number of history messages to include as context in group chats
communication.broadcastParallel: Parallel — send to all targets simultaneously
communication.broadcastSequential: Sequential — send one by one, strictly ordered
communication.broadcastHint: Strategy for broadcasting to multiple Agents. Parallel is faster, sequential is more controlled.
communication.cmdTextHint: Allow executing commands via / prefix in chat
communication.cmdBashHint: Allow ! prefix or /bash to execute shell commands in chat (dangerous)
communication.cmdDebugHint: Allow viewing debug info in chat
communication.nativeHint: Auto-register native command menus in supported channels (Telegram, Discord)
communication.webhookEnabledHint: Allow external services to trigger AI execution via HTTP
communication.webhookPathHint: Webhook receive path exposed on Gateway
communication.webhookTokenHint: External requests must include this token in header to trigger Webhook
communication.webhookSessionKeyHint: Session identifier for Webhook-triggered Agent. Leave empty for auto-generated.
communication.approvalsDesc: Forward approval requests to messaging channels when AI requests command execution, for mobile approval
communication.approvalsEnabledHint: Forward execution approval requests to configured channels
communication.approvalsModeSession: Session — forward to the originating session
communication.approvalsModeTargets: Targets — forward to configured target channels
communication.approvalsForwardExecHint: Forward exec approval requests to channels (off by default, enable for low-risk scenarios)

channels.title: Channels
channels.desc: Manage channel integrations; bind multiple channel routes per Agent with independent configs and connectivity testing
channels.agentBindHint: Each Agent can have multiple route bindings (e.g. different accounts or match conditions). Bindings are independent. Complete channel setup in "Channel List" first.
channels.createAgentFirst: Please create an Agent in "Agent Management" first
channels.qqbotDesc: Connect via QQ Open Platform, supports DM and group chat
channels.qqbotGuide1: 前往 QQ 开放平台 创建机器人
channels.qqbotGuide2: 在「开发 → 开发设置」中获取 AppID 和 ClientSecret
channels.qqbotGuide3: You can skip review and test directly in sandbox mode
channels.qqbotGuide4: Add the bot to your QQ group (sandbox channel also works)
channels.qqbotGuide5: Fill in credentials and save; the panel will auto-install the plugin, write config, and restart Gateway
channels.qqbotGuide6: @mention the bot in the group to start chatting
channels.qqbotGuideFooter: 遇到问题？参考 OpenClaw × QQ 常见问题
channels.dingtalkDesc: Connect via DingTalk enterprise internal app, supports DM and group chat
channels.dingtalkGuide1: 前往 钉钉开放平台，创建「企业内部应用」
channels.dingtalkGuide2: Enable Robot capability under "App Features → Robot"
channels.dingtalkGuide3: Set message receive mode to Stream Mode (recommended)
channels.dingtalkGuide4: Get Client ID (AppKey) and Client Secret (AppSecret) from credentials page
channels.dingtalkGuide6: Publish the app version, then add the bot to the target group
channels.dingtalkGuide7: Fill in credentials and save; the panel will auto-install the plugin and restart Gateway
channels.dingtalkGuideFooter: 注意：Stream 模式需要钉钉服务端主动推送，确保网络可达
channels.feishuDesc: Connect via Feishu custom enterprise app, supports DM and group chat
channels.feishuGuide1: 前往 飞书开放平台 创建企业自建应用
channels.feishuGuide3: Get App ID and App Secret from credentials page
channels.feishuGuide4: Select "Long Connection" for event callback (no public IP needed)
channels.feishuGuide5: 权限管理中搜索并开通 im:message、im:message.group_at_msg 等消息权限
channels.feishuGuide6: Create a version, publish, then add the bot to the target group
channels.feishuGuideFooter: 推荐使用长连接方式，无需公网地址即可接收消息
channels.telegramDesc: Connect a Telegram Bot, supports DM and groups
channels.telegramGuide1: 在 Telegram 中搜索 @BotFather 并发送 /newbot
channels.telegramGuide2: Follow prompts to set bot name and username
channels.telegramGuide3: Copy the Bot Token returned by BotFather
channels.telegramGuide4: Fill in credentials below and save
channels.telegramGuideFooter: 需要公网可达的服务器或使用 polling 模式
channels.discordDesc: Connect a Discord Bot, supports server channels and DMs
channels.discordGuide1: 前往 Discord Developer Portal 创建 Application
channels.discordGuide2: Click "Reset Token" on the Bot page to get the Bot Token
channels.discordGuide4: Use OAuth2 URL Generator to invite the Bot to your server
channels.discordGuideFooter: 确保开启 Message Content Intent 以接收消息内容
channels.slackDesc: Connect a Slack App, supports channels and DMs
channels.slackGuide1: 前往 Slack API 创建 App（推荐 From a manifest）
channels.slackGuide2: Add Bot Token Scopes in OAuth & Permissions: chat:write, app_mentions:read, etc.
channels.slackGuide3: Install the App to your workspace and get the Bot Token (xoxb-)
channels.slackGuide4: Socket Mode: Enable Socket Mode in Basic Information and get the App-Level Token (xapp-)
channels.slackGuide5: HTTP Mode: Fill in the Request URL under Event Subscriptions
channels.slackGuideFooter: Socket Mode 无需公网地址；HTTP Mode 需要配置事件回调 URL
channels.slackSigningSecretHint: Used to verify request signatures in HTTP Mode
channels.allowFromHint: Restrict to specific user or channel IDs; leave empty for no restriction
channels.weixinDesc: Connect personal WeChat via the openclaw-weixin plugin
channels.weixinGuide1: This feature is powered by the openclaw-weixin plugin
channels.weixinGuide3: After installation, click "Scan to Login" and scan the QR code with your phone
channels.weixinGuide4: Once logged in, Gateway will automatically handle messages
channels.weixinGuideFooter: 注意：个人微信接入存在风控风险，建议使用小号
channels.weixinInstallHint: Auto-download and install the openclaw-weixin plugin
channels.weixinLoginHint: Start the WeChat login flow; messages are handled after scanning
channels.weixinScanQr: Scan this QR code with WeChat on your phone
channels.msteamsGuide1: 在 Azure Portal 注册 Bot Channel Registration
channels.msteamsGuide3: Install the custom App in Teams
channels.msteamsGuideFooter: 需要 Azure AD 应用注册和 Teams 管理员权限
channels.signalGuide1: 安装 signal-cli 并注册/链接账号
channels.signalGuide2: Ensure signal-cli can send and receive messages
channels.signalGuide3: Fill in account info and signal-cli path
channels.signalGuideFooter: 需要本地安装 signal-cli 并完成账号注册
channels.matrixDesc: Connect via Matrix protocol (Element and other clients)
channels.matrixGuide1: Register a Bot account on a Matrix server
channels.matrixGuide2: Get an Access Token (or use username & password)
channels.matrixGuide3: Invite the Bot to the target room
channels.matrixGuideFooter: 支持任何兼容 Matrix 协议的服务器
channels.matrixAccessTokenHint: Use either Access Token or User ID + Password
channels.matrixPasswordPh: Leave empty when using Access Token
channels.matrixAuthRequired: Matrix requires an Access Token, or User ID + Password
channels.addAgentBindingSub: Add a new Agent route for this account
channels.routeToAgent: Route incoming messages to a specific Agent
channels.addNewAccountSub: Create a new bot account configuration
channels.targetAgentHint: Select the Agent to receive messages
channels.peerAllHint: Receive all messages from this channel
channels.peerIdHintDetailed: Restrict to a specific group/user ID; leave empty to match all
channels.duplicateBinding: A binding with the same configuration already exists
channels.orphanAgent: Binding exists in config but Agent ID not found in current list
channels.enableChannelFirst: Please connect and enable at least one channel in "Channel List" first
channels.bindingIndependentHint: Each binding works independently; you can add multiple rules for the same channel
channels.noMultiAccount: This channel does not support multiple accounts
channels.noMultiAccountHint: Add multiple accounts in the channel list first
channels.confirmRemoveAccount: Remove this account and all its config?
channels.confirmRemovePlatform: Remove this platform and all its config?
channels.qqRepairHint: Try one-click repair: reinstall plugin and restart Gateway
channels.noCredentialsFound: No credentials found for this channel in config
channels.whatsappScanQr: Scan this QR code with WhatsApp on your phone
channels.whatsappScanPath: WhatsApp → Linked Devices → Link a Device
channels.whatsappAlreadyLinked: WhatsApp is already linked, no need to re-scan
channels.scanTimeoutRetry: Scan timed out or not completed, please retry
channels.docsOnlyTitle: Configuration wizard for this channel is not yet available
channels.docsOnlyDefault: Please complete setup via upstream docs or CLI first
channels.newVersionAvailable: New version {version} available, click "Upgrade Plugin" to update
channels.clickInstallBelow: Click "Install Plugin" below to get started
channels.accountIdPlaceholder: Leave empty for default account; changing creates a new account
channels.accountIdHint: Each account corresponds to an independent bot. Different accounts can bind to different Agents.
channels.bindAgentHint: Which Agent receives messages for this account (add more bindings in "Agent Binding" tab).
channels.pairingApprovalHint: When the bot shows access not configured, Pairing code, or asks to run openclaw pairing approve, you can approve directly here.
channels.preActionsHint: For channels that require CLI login, scanning, or initialization commands first.
channels.gatewayAuthAutoFilled: Auto-filled {type} from current Gateway auth config; usually no need to fill manually
channels.existingConfigHint: Existing config found; edit and click Save to overwrite
channels.qqDiagHint: 检查已保存到配置文件的凭证、本机 Gateway 端口、/__api/health、QQ 插件与 chatCompletions。QQ 提示「灵魂不在线」时优先看此处，并参考 OpenClaw × QQ 常见问题。
channels.qqVerifyNote: 此项只验证 AppID/Secret 能否向腾讯换 token。不能代表 QQ 里机器人已在线；若提示「灵魂不在线」，请使用下方 完整联通诊断 并对照 QQ OpenClaw 常见问题。
channels.pluginDetected: Plugin detected, no need to reinstall; only updating config

memory.title: Memory Files
memory.editorPlaceholder: Select a file on the left to edit...
memory.catMemoryDesc: Active working context, decision records and progress tracking
memory.catArchiveDesc: Archived historical memory files, organized by time period
memory.catCoreDesc: Agent core configuration files like AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, etc.
memory.newFileHint: Recommended .md format. File will be saved to the current category directory

cron.title: Scheduled Tasks
cron.desc: Create scheduled tasks to let AI execute commands at set times
cron.gwHint: Scheduled tasks are managed via Gateway. Please start Gateway first.
cron.noTasksHint: Click "+ New Task" to create your first scheduled task
cron.gwNotConnected: Gateway not connected. Please start Gateway first to manage scheduled tasks
cron.taskMessagePlaceholder: AI will execute this command when triggered
cron.taskAgentHint: Uses default Agent if not specified
cron.taskDeliveryHint: Must be specified when multiple messaging channels are configured

usage.title: Usage
usage.desc: View token consumption, API costs and model usage statistics
usage.gwWait: Will auto-load once Gateway is connected
usage.loadFailedHint: You may need to update OpenClaw to 2026.3.11+ for Usage API support

skills.title: Skills
skills.desc: Manage installed Skills or search and install new ones from the community
skills.loadFailedHint: Please confirm OpenClaw is installed and available
skills.noSkillsHint: Please confirm OpenClaw is properly installed. Skills are bundled with OpenClaw; custom Skills may be in ~/.openclaw/skills/ or ~/.claude/skills/.
skills.missingEnvHint: — must be set in system environment
skills.noAutoInstall: No auto-install option, please install manually
skills.searchPlaceholder: Search skills, e.g. weather / github / tavily
skills.searchEmpty: Enter keywords to search community Skills, then install with one click
skills.searchKeyword: Enter keywords to search community Skills
skills.rateLimitClawHub: ClawHub rate limited, try switching to SkillHub (China accelerated)
skills.skillhubNeedCLIHint: Click "Install CLI" above, or switch to ClawHub source
skills.sourceLocalScanTimeout: CLI available but timed out, showing local scan results
skills.sourceLocalScanParseFailed: CLI available but output parse failed, showing local scan results
skills.sourceLocalScanExecFailed: CLI execution failed, showing local scan results
skills.sourceLocalScanNoCli: CLI not available, showing local scan results

chat.title: Live Chat
chat.desc: Chat with AI Agents in real-time
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message, Enter to send, / for commands
chat.createAgentHint: Please create a new Agent in the Agent management page
chat.confirmResetSession:
Reset session "{label}"?

This will clear all chat history for this session. This action cannot be undone.
chat.gatewayNotReadySend: Gateway not ready, will send after connection
chat.connectionRejected: Connection rejected by Gateway, click "Fix & Reconnect"
chat.imageHistoryHint: Some history images cannot be displayed (Gateway does not retain original image data, only visible in current session)
chat.firstUseHint: First time? Make sure Gateway is running, or click "Fix & Reconnect" to auto-fix
chat.guideDesc: This page connects to your OpenClaw AI Agent via Gateway. Conversations are processed by your deployed OpenClaw service.
chat.guideHint: To use ClawPanel's built-in AI Assistant (independent of OpenClaw), go to "AI Assistant" in the left menu.
chat.taskGoalPlaceholder: e.g. Continuously optimize code quality until no improvements remain
chat.hostedHint: Hosted Agent will continuously guide OpenClaw to complete this goal. Uses AI Assistant model config.
chat.hostedAutoStopSignal: OpenClaw reply contains completion signal, auto-stopping
chat.hostedModelNotConfigured: Hosted Agent model not configured (please configure in AI Assistant page)

chatDebug.title: System Diagnostics
chatDebug.desc: Comprehensive system status check, quickly locate issues
chatDebug.someFunctionsError: Some functions abnormal, see details below
chatDebug.diagNodeNotInstalled: Node.js not installed. Please install Node.js first (Download)
chatDebug.diagConfigMissing: Config file missing or corrupted, please go to Setup page to complete configuration
chatDebug.diagCliNotInstalled: OpenClaw CLI not installed, please go to Setup page to install
chatDebug.diagGatewayNotRunning: Gateway not running, please go to Services page to start
chatDebug.diagTokenNotSet: Gateway token not set (optional for local dev, recommended for production)
chatDebug.diagDeviceKeyFailed: Device key generation failed, check Rust backend logs
chatDebug.diagWsNotConnected: Gateway running but WebSocket not connected. Common cause: origin not allowed (Tauri origin not whitelisted) or port {port} occupied. Click "Fix Pairing" to auto-fix origin issues
chatDebug.diagWsHandshakeFailed: WebSocket connected but handshake incomplete, check if token is correct
chatDebug.diagAllOk: All checks passed, system running normally
chatDebug.installCorruptHint: Module files missing. Go to About page to switch version or reinstall OpenClaw CLI.
chatDebug.installCorruptToast: OpenClaw installation corrupted, recommend reinstalling from About page
chatDebug.configFixPartial: Fix complete, some issues may need manual handling
chatDebug.cliUnavailableHint: Please go to About page to install or reinstall OpenClaw.
chatDebug.wsOriginRejected: origin not allowed (1008) - Gateway rejected current app origin
chatDebug.wsOriginFix: Solution: Click "Fix Pairing" to auto-add tauri://localhost to whitelist and restart Gateway
chatDebug.wsAuthFailed: Auth failed (4001) - Token may be incorrect
chatDebug.wsAbnormalClose: Abnormal close (1006) - May be network issue or Gateway disconnect
chatDebug.fixWritingPair: Writing device pairing info + Gateway origin whitelist...
chatDebug.fixGwMaybeStarting: Gateway may still be starting, please test manually later
chatDebug.fixOriginStillRejected: Reason: Gateway rejected current app origin, need to restart Gateway
chatDebug.fixSuggestManualRestart: Suggestion: Manually restart Gateway from Services page
chatDebug.fixWsConnFailed: WebSocket connection failed, please confirm Gateway is running
chatDebug.fixOriginRejected1008: Connection rejected (1008) - Gateway rejected current origin
chatDebug.fixRetryHint: This issue should have been fixed, please click "Fix Pairing" again

setup.title: Setup
setup.headerDesc: Desktop management panel for OpenClaw AI Agent framework
setup.stepNodeHint: OpenClaw requires Node.js, please install it first.
setup.macNodeHint: On macOS, launching from Finder may not find Node.js. Try closing ClawPanel and launching from terminal:
setup.winNodeHint: After installing Node.js, click "Re-detect" or use "Auto Scan" below, no restart needed.
setup.gitHttpsConfigured: Auto-configured Git to use HTTPS (avoids SSH connection issues)
setup.stepGitHint: Some dependencies require Git to download source code. Click the button below to auto-install, or install manually if it fails.
setup.gitOptionalHint: Can I install without Git? Usually yes, but some dependencies may require Git. Recommended to install to avoid issues.
setup.cliAheadWarning: Detected local OpenClaw {current} is ahead of the panel's recommended stable version {recommended}. There may be compatibility or stability risks. Consider rolling back to the recommended version on the About page.
setup.configMissing: Config file not found. Click the button below to create default config.
setup.customDirHint: If OpenClaw is installed in a non-default directory, specify it here. Leave empty to use the default path.
setup.aiAssistantDesc: Having installation issues? AI Assistant can help diagnose and solve them. After configuring a model, click the button below
setup.aiAssistantDescProblem: , current issues will be auto-sent to AI for analysis
setup.nextStepsDesc: Environment is ready, but you still need to complete the following steps before chatting:
setup.nextStep1: Go to "Model Config" to add at least one model and confirm primary model is set
setup.nextStep2: Go to "Gateway" to confirm service is running
setup.nextStep3: For messaging channels (Feishu, DingTalk, QQ etc.), go to "Channels" to set up
setup.installHint: Installation will use the recommended stable version bound to this ClawPanel release. To change versions later, go to the About page.
setup.installHint2: To try latest features, install the recommended stable version first then switch manually. To request latest version support, submit an issue.
setup.methodStandaloneR2: Standalone Package · CDN (Recommended for China, includes Node.js, no npm needed)
setup.methodStandaloneGithub: Standalone Package · GitHub (Fallback when CDN unavailable)
setup.methodNpm: npm Install (Traditional, requires Node.js + npm + network)
setup.methodHintAuto: Auto-selects best method: prefers standalone package (zero deps, fastest), falls back to npm on failure.
setup.methodHintR2: Downloads standalone package from CDN with bundled Node.js runtime, no npm needed. Fastest for China.
setup.methodHintGithub: Downloads standalone package from GitHub Releases. Fallback when CDN is unavailable.
setup.methodHintNpm: Traditional npm install, requires local Node.js, npm, and network access to npm registry.
setup.envHintDesc: ClawPanel desktop can only manage locally installed OpenClaw. Installations in these environments cannot be detected:
setup.envHintWslDesc: OpenClaw in WSL is not accessible from Windows side
setup.envHintDockerDesc: Container installations are isolated from host
setup.envHintInstallManage: Install management panel in the corresponding environment
setup.envHintLocalReinstall: Or, reinstall OpenClaw locally using the install button below.
setup.wslWebDesc: Open WSL terminal, one-click deploy ClawPanel Web version:
setup.wslWebPostDeploy: After deployment, access via WSL IP in your browser.
setup.dockerDesc: Install OpenClaw + ClawPanel Web in container:
setup.domesticMirror: For users in China who cannot access GitHub:
setup.promptNodeMissing: Node.js not installed or not detected
setup.promptIntro: I'm having issues installing OpenClaw. Here is the current detection status:
setup.promptOutro: Please help me analyze the issues and provide solution steps. Use tools to check the system environment if needed.
setup.gitManualInstallHtml:
Windows: Download from git-scm.com
macOS: Run xcode-select --install or brew install git
Linux: sudo apt install git or sudo yum install git
setup.gitAutoInstallFailedToast: Git auto install failed, please install manually
setup.scanNotFound: Node.js not found, please specify path manually or download.
setup.nodeNotFoundAtPath: Node executable not found in this directory, please verify the path.
setup.bgTaskStarted: Background install task started, please wait...
setup.webModeLogHint: Web mode: Install logs unavailable, please wait...

about.title: About
about.subtitle: OpenClaw Visual Management Panel
about.techStack: ClawPanel is built with Tauri v2, Vanilla JS + Vite frontend, Rust backend.
about.copyright: MIT License © 2026 Wuhan Qingchen Tianxia Network Technology Co., Ltd.
about.policyAhead: Your local installation {current} is ahead of the recommended stable version. There may be API, event, or config compatibility issues. Consider rolling back to {recommended}; if you want to keep the newer version, verify compatibility yourself and watch issues/releases.
about.policyDefault: This panel only guarantees compatibility with the recommended stable version. If you want to try other versions or previews, verify compatibility yourself. Submit an issue if you want us to support the latest version sooner.
about.aheadOfRecommended: Current version is ahead of recommended stable: {ver}
about.confirmUninstall:
Are you sure you want to uninstall OpenClaw?

This will stop the Gateway service and uninstall the npm global package.
Config files (~/.openclaw/) are kept by default and can be deleted manually later.
about.versionPickerHint: Recommended to use the stable version bound to this panel. Switching to other versions (especially preview/latest) requires manual compatibility verification. Submit an issue if you want latest version support.
about.webModeNoLog: Web mode: Install logs unavailable, please wait...
about.rollbackSuccess: Rolled back to embedded version, reloading...
about.downloadDone: Update downloaded, click "Reload App" to apply
about.communityDesc: Scan QR code or click link to join, report issues and get help
about.communityWelcome: Welcome to the OpenClaw community! Report issues anytime, let's make AI Agents better together.
about.communityWelcomeIntl: Welcome to the OpenClaw community! Share ideas, get help, and build amazing AI agents together.
about.communityNote: 2000+ members, auto-switch when full · Report issues directly in group
about.projectOpenClaw: AI Agent framework with multi-model collaboration, tool calling, memory management
about.projectOpenClawZh: Our maintained Chinese translation of OpenClaw, 3000+ Stars, Chinese UI + domestic mirror optimization
about.projectClawPanel: OpenClaw visual management panel, Tauri v2 desktop app
about.projectClawApp: Cross-platform mobile chat client, H5 + proxy server architecture, offline and streaming support
about.projectCftunnel: Full-protocol tunnel tool, Cloud mode free HTTP/WS + Relay mode self-hosted
about.contributeDesc: ClawPanel is open source! Report bugs via Issues, submit feature requests and code improvements via PRs.
about.domesticMirrorHint: China mirror: Gitee (use when GitHub is inaccessible)
about.companyName: Wuhan Qingchen Tianxia Network Technology Co., Ltd.
about.contactViaWebsite: Please contact us via our website
about.companyDesc: We are the team behind OpenClaw Chinese Translation (3000+ Stars) and ClawPanel. We build AI Agent products and open source tools, and offer enterprise deployment and custom development services.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.desc: Manage cftunnel tunneling and ClawApp mobile client
ext.cftunnelDesc: Expose local services to the internet via Cloudflare Tunnel, no public IP or port mapping needed.
ext.clawappDesc: H5 mobile chat client connecting to Gateway via proxy server. Supports local and public access.
ext.webModeNoLogs: Web mode: install logs unavailable, please wait...
